title: Diff viewer component for displaying file changes in agent sessions
purpose: Displays a list of changed files and their patch content for a given agent session, allowing users to navigate between files and view detailed changes.
module_context: Exports a DiffViewer React component that fetches and displays git diff data for agent worktrees, with UI for file selection and patch rendering.

steps.content: Return CSS class for a green badge when status is 'A'.
Return CSS class for a red badge when status is 'D'.
Return CSS class for a blue badge when status is 'R'.
Return CSS class for a yellow badge when status is '??'.
Return CSS class for a gray badge for all other statuses including 'M'.
Return 'U' when status is '??'.
Return the original status for all other cases.
Set default text color to gray for most lines.
Set text color to gray-500 with font weight bold for lines starting with '+++' or '---'.
Set text color to purple-600 for lines starting with '@@'.
Set text color to green-700 with green background for lines starting with '+'.
Set text color to red-700 with red background for lines starting with '-'.
Set text color to gray-400 for lines starting with 'diff ' or 'index '.
Return a div element with the computed class and line content.
Initialize state for files, selected file path, loading status, and error message.
Fetch diff data from the API endpoint for the given session ID.
IF the fetch succeeds, update the files state and select the first file.
IF the fetch fails, update the error state and clear loading status.
Return a loading indicator while data is being fetched.
Return an error message if the fetch failed.
Return a no changes message if no files are present.
Render a file list sidebar with selectable file entries.
Render the patch content for the currently selected file.
